name: U10 Foundations: 6-Week Development Program
description: A complete 6-week youth field hockey development program for Under 10 players. Two sessions per week progressing from fundamental stick skills through to match play. Suitable for beginners through intermediate players.

weeks.homeAssignment: 50 wall passes each night (forehand). Practice Indian dribble around household objects for 5 minutes.
Wall passes: 25 forehand + 25 reverse. Practice trap-and-turn against a wall.
Agility ladder drills (or make one with chalk). 50 wall passes with one-touch challenge.
Target practice: set up a goal (two cones) and shoot 30 balls. Practice hitting low and accurate.
Self-assessment: write down your best skill and one thing to improve. Practice your improvement area for 10 minutes.
Rest and recovery before game day. Visualize yourself performing your best skill in a match.

goals: Master basic push pass and receiving technique
Have fun and love the sport
assessmentCriteria: Can execute a push pass accurately over 5 meters
Can dribble through a cone slalom at speed
Understands the jab tackle and when to use it
Can receive and turn under light pressure
